scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/server build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd apps/server test && bun run --cwd apps/web test
scripts.dev:all: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:web
scripts.test:unit: bun run --cwd apps/server test -- test/normalize.test.ts test/event-store.test.ts && bun run --cwd apps/web test -- src/lib/ui.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: bun run --cwd apps/server test -- test/log-ingestion.test.ts test/api.test.ts
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration && bun run test:e2e
